symptoms.symptom_name: Burning/gnawing epigastric pain worse shortly after eating

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Post-prandial burning epigastric pain is characteristic of a gastric ulcer.

symptoms.symptom_name: Severe nocturnal epigastric pain waking the patient (~2 AM)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Nocturnal acid-related pain reflects unbuffered gastric acid on the ulcer base.
Common in symptomatic ulcer disease; recurrent vomiting also raises gastric outlet compromise.
Persistent vomiting with early satiety is an alarm feature that can accompany an obstructing gastric tumour.

symptoms.symptom_name: Unintentional weight loss (~3 kg) with early satiety

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Upper GI alarm feature — mandates endoscopy to exclude a malignant ulcer.
Unintentional weight loss is not a feature of functional disease and should exclude a benign functional label without endoscopy.

symptoms.symptom_name: Chronic unopposed NSAID use (ibuprofen 400 mg TDS)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Regular non-selective NSAID use without gastroprotection is a leading cause of gastric ulceration and its complications.

symptoms.symptom_name: No haematemesis, coffee-ground vomiting or melaena reported

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of overt bleeding keeps the baseline below an emergency tier but does not exclude occult blood loss or future haemorrhage.

symptoms.symptom_name: Localised epigastric tenderness on deep palpation WITHOUT guarding, rebound or board-like rigidity

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed clinician finding: localised epigastric tenderness with the ABSENCE of peritonism argues against a free perforation — an in-person exam the AI Doctor cannot perform, which is why urgent same-day in-person assessment is required.

symptoms.symptom_name: Haemodynamically stable clinician-measured vitals (BP 130/80, HR 85, afebrile, SpO2 99%)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Sealed clinician measurement: haemodynamic stability supports the absence of active major haemorrhage but is a snapshot only; the AI Doctor cannot measure these remotely.
A positive H. pylori result identifies a co-factor requiring eradication; it is a pathology test that cannot be obtained in the telehealth encounter.

investigation_details.expected_result: Pending — positive or negative; if positive, eradication therapy is indicated
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A treatable co-factor for ulcer disease and recurrence is missed.

symptoms.symptom_name: Upper GI endoscopy showing a gastric mucosal defect (ulcer) with biopsy

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Endoscopy visualises the ulcer and, critically, biopsy excludes a malignant gastric ulcer — the confirmatory test the AI Doctor cannot perform; a benign diagnosis is not safe without it.

investigation_details.expected_result: Gastric ulcer expected; biopsy required to confirm benignity and exclude carcinoma
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: A malignant gastric ulcer is missed and treated as benign dyspepsia.

symptom_clusters.cluster_name: NSAID gastric-ulcer flare with an alarm feature
symptom_clusters.target_diagnosis: NSAID-associated peptic (gastric) ulcer disease requiring endoscopy to exclude malignancy
symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Post-prandial burning epigastric pain + vomiting on a background of regular NSAID use points strongly to a gastric ulcer, while the unintentional weight loss + early satiety make endoscopy mandatory to exclude a malignant ulcer.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Upper gastrointestinal endoscopy with biopsy (urgent / 2-week-wait given the weight-loss alarm feature)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Confirms the ulcer, excludes gastric malignancy by biopsy, and documents healing — the definitive investigation that cannot be done remotely.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Helicobacter pylori stool antigen (or urea breath) test
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Identifies a treatable co-factor for the ulcer so eradication can be arranged if positive.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Full blood count and iron studies
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Screens for anaemia from occult chronic blood loss — part of the urgent in-person assessment the AI Doctor cannot perform.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Serum lipase / abdominal imaging for the pain 'just in case'
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not indicated on this presentation as first-line from telehealth — the pattern is a gastric ulcer, and the AI should refer for endoscopy and in-person assessment rather than over-order remote tests it cannot action.
